---
title: ""
---

# Rosie Wood

**Research Software/Compute Engineer**
Alan Turing Institute

::: {.d-flex .gap-3 style="margin-top: 1rem;"}
[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](https://github.com/rwood-97){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/rosie-w-01616715b){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
